creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Your port is giving this issue:

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)

is referring to /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/py-orjson/work-py39/stage

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/py-orjson
